changes.summary: Comment image uploads now work — images were being dropped between the composer and the API, so uploads appeared to succeed but images never showed on the posted comment
Team icons on The Board no longer have a blue circle background — they now match the transparent style used on Ask Roger
Image uploads no longer fail with a 413 error on large photos — images are now auto-compressed client-side before uploading via Vercel Blob's direct upload
Category icons on The Board now use SVG sprite icons (beer, gavel, wrench) instead of plain emoji text
